description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can featuring a vibrant and detailed label with a teal and black color scheme, accented by red highlights. The label is adorned with intricate illustrations, including a stylized human face and foliage motifs, giving it an artistic and modern appearance. The front of the can displays bold, white typography indicating the beer type and style, with additional information about the beverage in smaller text. The top of the can is metallic and slightly crumpled, with a standard pull tab opening. The surface of the can appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation. The overall design is eye-catching and contemporary, suitable for urban environments.
description: A tall, teal and black aluminum beer can with bold white lettering and intricate, artistic illustrations. The can features a smooth metallic surface and a modern, visually striking label.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with bold white 'IPA' text, intricate teal and black graphics, and clear product information.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the nutritional and recycling information, with less emphasis on the main graphics and more text details.
description_view_2: The back view displays additional product information and a continuation of the teal and red graphic design, with less prominent branding.
description_view_3: This view highlights the artistic illustration of a human face and foliage, with red accents standing out against the teal background.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features intricate teal and black illustrations with red highlights, including a stylized human face and foliage. Bold white typography is used for the product name, with a modern and artistic overall design.
